name: ai-fairness-engine
description: AI Decision Fairness Engine — Full-stack bias detection system

scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && echo '\n✅ Setup complete! Copy .env.example files and run npm run dev'
